text: @Kibet_bull Ruto knows that Luos are so emotional. Just let them see Kikuyu as the enemy, then they will be happy even with nothing tangible done to them. The fact is that Ruto is doing much more in Mt.Kenya. As long as a luo hates Kikuyu he's Happy
label: hate
rationale: 'Luos are so emotional' and 'as long as a luo hates Kikuyu he's Happy' collectively attributes irrationality and tribal hatred as fixed group characteristics - NCIC collective ethnic contempt against the Luo community.

text: @joeselasini Hakutakua na maandamano hapa tanzania ila hawa chui ni wa mchongo bhana
label: neither
rationale: 'hawa chui' (these leopards/leaders) with 'wa mchongo' (crafty/sly) reads as a political insult aimed at specific political actors in Tanzania, not collective ethnic contempt against a group.

text: @NeShienu Sifuna team should Join forces with Moses wetangula and Mudavadi, Luhyas can only get power through Kalenjins and Luos
label: neither
rationale: Straightforward coalition and electoral arithmetic - 'Luhyas can only get power through Kalenjins and Luos' - no contempt or attack.

text: @jimNjue_ Honestly I don't see Sifuna being part of the presidency.The opposition should and have settled on Kalonzo Matiangi ticket. Luhyas will steal vote for Ruto. History has always indicated they don't vote as a block
label: hate
rationale: 'Luhyas will steal vote for Ruto' attributes collective electoral treachery to the entire Luhya community as a group - NCIC collective negative characteristic even within a political framing.

text: @Kenyans Murkomen is the biggest idiot we have in Kenya.
label: offensive
rationale: 'Biggest idiot' is a personal insult directed at a named politician with no ethnic targeting.

text: @Bygones_24 @chris_ogai @FarmBastion Why are you even arguing with these ignorant wamunyoro f00ls. Just leave them believe whatever they want to believe
label: hate
rationale: 'These ignorant wamunyoro fools' - 'wamunyoro' is an ethnic marker for Kikuyu and pairing it with 'ignorant fools' collectively attributes stupidity to the ethnic group.

text: @MainNeli_ Fire all of them. Let the next ones be prolific at opposition politics. Mtaendelea kupayuka payuka kama wendawazimu every election cycle because y'all are emotional retards motivated by hatred and animosity of other tribes. Kila wakati it will voting against not FOR something.
label: neither
rationale: Harsh criticism directed at opposition politicians and their supporters as a political class, not at an ethnic group as such - 'emotional retards motivated by hatred' is abusive but the target is a political behavioural pattern, not a named ethnic community.

text: @ahmednasirlaw Who told you that kikuyu want to be in the presidency? Its either Matiangi or fred matiangi for kikuyus.
label: neither
rationale: Electoral arithmetic and candidate preference framing for the Kikuyu community - no contempt or attack.

text: "Ruto ni mwizi na mkabila mkubwa, Kenya Ports Authority ametoa Ksh. 8 billion kujenga 1KM ya barabara." ~ Gachagua
label: neither
rationale: Quoting Gachagua's attack on Ruto as an individual politician - 'mwizi na mkabila mkubwa' is aimed at the named person, not transferred onto his ethnic community.

text: @DrJuma_M Gachietha is the weak link in the United Opposition. This ethnic bigot is a mole.
label: offensive
rationale: 'Ethnic bigot' and 'mole' are personal insults directed at a named individual politician, not at any ethnic group.

text: @HassanMcOjwang Mkikuyu hawezi saliti watu wao. Wantam is unstoppable.
label: hate
rationale: 'Mkikuyu hawezi saliti watu wao' - attributes immutable in-group loyalty as a collective ethnic characteristic; while framed positively here it essentialises the whole Kikuyu community and functions within a tribal-loyalty discourse that the NCIC standard covers.

text: Wewe Gachagua Unadhani Ni wewe Pekee Unajua Vita!2027 Tutawaonesha Kikuyus Kuwa Hamna Kura!Ruku!
label: hate
rationale: 'Tutawaonesha Kikuyus Kuwa Hamna Kura' transfers the political grievance against Gachagua onto the entire Kikuyu community as a group to be shown their place - collective ethnic contempt and implied threat.

text: @kaninikega1 Kanini Koru wewe ni kinembe ya mbwa Sana. DCP will lose Old Kalou by-election to UDA and there is nothing mkundu kama wewe can do. William Ruto will be your president for 10 years hata ukiruka ruka juu Chini, mbele nyuma, kulia kushoto. Wamashares will never be president of Kenya
label: hate
rationale: 'Wamashares will never be president of Kenya' categorically declares the Kikuyu community collectively unfit to hold the presidency - NCIC standard: group declared unfit to lead.

text: SOCIALISM: African-born socialists seek to destroy America and remake into an Islamic state free from Christians and Jews.
label: hate
rationale: 'African-born socialists seek to destroy America and remake into an Islamic state' attributes a destructive civilisational agenda collectively to African-origin people and implicitly to Muslims - collective ethnic and religious contempt.

text: RT @AnuarSaddat: Ruto has sent the entire government might to Ol Kalou, ready to maim and kill Kikuyus should they protest IEBC preprogrammed kit that will give the UDA candidate a win by around 15,480 votes against DCP's 13, 650.
label: neither
rationale: Describes alleged state violence against Kikuyus as a political accusation against Ruto - the author's stance is condemnatory of the government, not incitement against any ethnic group.

text: @Wakabando @johnnjenga Kikuyus and their entitlement think presidency is their birthright.
label: hate
rationale: 'Kikuyus and their entitlement think presidency is their birthright' attributes collective arrogance and unwarranted claims to power to the entire Kikuyu community - NCIC collective negative characteristic.

text: Some 214 traitors of the Kalenjin community arriving in Wamunyoro shrines to officiate another oath
label: hate
rationale: 'Traitors of the Kalenjin community' plus framing Kikuyu ('Wamunyoro') cultural spaces as threatening 'shrines' collectively imputes treachery and suspect allegiance to named members of the Kalenjin community in an ethnic-contempt frame.

text: @gpdkaluma We shida ikibweka kama ujinga ni hii ya ukabila.kiti inarudi mt kenya 2032.then 2042 riftvalley.look what ruto is doing in ol kalao,than can not happen in Luo nyanza. Mnabebwa ufala ,mtagundua kama mumechelewa.
label: neither
rationale: Ethnic-bloc electoral rotation argument and criticism of perceived regional favouritism in government spending - 'mnabebwa ufala' is harsh but aimed at political supporters, not an ethnic group as a group.

text: @Honcalebamisi @gikundamarangu The mountain is indeed an expensive bride in every conceivable way! You can rent a Kikuyu, but you can't fully succeed to buy one!
label: hate
rationale: 'You can rent a Kikuyu, but you can't fully succeed to buy one' attributes collective transactional disloyalty as an immutable ethnic characteristic to all Kikuyu - NCIC collective ethnic contempt.

text: HATA KAMA UMEOA MSICHANA WA UGANDA HUYO APEWE KURA NI MKENYA APIGE KURA!! FEARLESS WETANGULA
label: neither
rationale: Electoral advocacy urging spousal voting rights for Ugandan wives of Kenyan citizens - political statement with no ethnic contempt or attack.

text: Ruto amejiuza,atapelekea walunje mkati na soda 2027.
label: neither
rationale: 'Atapelekea walunje mkati na soda' - cynical prediction that Ruto will bribe Luhya voters with cheap goods; political critique of vote-buying without attributing a negative collective characteristic to the Luhya community.

text: @NelsonHavi Am a luhya and am not afraid to say sisi ni watu kumbafu sana. Wetangula and Mdvd wameshiba and they don't care. Sifuna all the way this time
label: neither
rationale: In-group self-deprecating critique by a self-identified Luhya - political frustration directed at named Luhya leaders, not external contempt against the community.

text: @MweiSebby @Lightcasttvke @BuboluOdindiko They will not, I can school you guys a bit, the Luhya who had problems with Raila are Bukusu, now Raila is dead, Sifuna is Bukusu and they are the majority Luhyas, they are going to vote in 1 basket, Luos are hurt by this realization. I come from Kakamega, trust me.
label: neither
rationale: Intra-Luhya sub-group electoral analysis and coalition prediction - 'Luos are hurt by this realization' is an electoral observation with no contempt.

text: RT @itsbarasa99: Niondoleeni upuzi wana kasongo. Shenzi
label: hate
rationale: 'Wana kasongo' is a derogatory ethnic slur for Kikuyu paired with 'shenzi' (uncivilised/barbaric) - ethnic group targeted with a degrading slur.

text: @KeKirwa Kukua mkikuyu hii kenya ni full time job , kushinda ikiitwa ni kasongo , vifaranga vyake , sudi , odm , wasomali , from the most rich to the poorest hawapuumziki bwana
label: hate
rationale: 'Kukua mkikuyu... kushinda ikiitwa ni kasongo' frames belonging to the Kikuyu community as conferring collective victimhood through constant ethnic slurring - while framed as sympathy, the post rehearses and amplifies multiple ethnic slurs ('kasongo', 'vifaranga vyake') applied to Kikuyu as a group.
